title:
The Environmental Protection (Wet Wipes Containing Plastic) 
(England) Regulations 2025 draft SI
body: "In April 2024, the government announced that wet wipes containing plastic will be banned across the UK.    Wet wipes containing plastic are an unnecessary source of plastic and microplastic pollution.    We have published draft regulations for the ban on the supply and sale of wet wipes containing plastic in England.  Submit your views   If you have any comments or views on the draft regulations, send them to us at: WetWipes@defra.gov.uk by 31 July 2025. "
